---
title: ""
title-block-style: none
anchor-sections: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="theme-banner" style="--theme-bg: #2F5F5F;"><div class="banner-title">Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</div><p class="banner-sub">1,620 posts where this was the primary topic.</p></div>
```


<script src="https://cdn.plot.ly/plotly-2.35.2.min.js"></script>


<div id="theme-volume" class="volume-chart"></div>
<script>
  (function () {
    var d = [{ x: ["2009", "2010", "2011", "2012", "2013", "2014", "2015", "2016", "2017", "2018", "2019", "2020", "2021", "2022", "2023", "2024", "2025", "2026"], y: [1, 4, 27, 135, 93, 87, 107, 74, 124, 150, 209, 237, 3, 17, 99, 93, 134, 26],
                type: "bar", marker: { color: "#2F5F5F" } }];
    var l = {
      margin: { t: 10, r: 10, b: 35, l: 40 },
      paper_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      plot_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      xaxis: { tickfont: { family: "Libre Franklin" } },
      yaxis: { tickfont: { family: "Libre Franklin" } },
      height: 260, showlegend: false
    };
    Plotly.newPlot("theme-volume", d, l, {displayModeBar: false, responsive: true});
  })();
</script>


<p class="small-caps">Recurring phrases</p>
<span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#2F5F5F'>https www</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#2F5F5F'>united states</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#2F5F5F'>make america</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#2F5F5F'>donald trump</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#2F5F5F'>great again</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#2F5F5F'>america great</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#2F5F5F'>com news</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#2F5F5F'>american workers</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#2F5F5F'>president trump</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#2F5F5F'>http bit</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#2F5F5F'>new jobs</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#2F5F5F'>jobs numbers</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#2F5F5F'>great job</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#2F5F5F'>jobs report</span>, <span class='chip' style='--chip-color:#2F5F5F'>www rsbnetwork</span>


::: {.muted}
Showing the top 40 posts ranked by how clearly they match this theme. Other secondary themes for each post are shown as chips.
:::

```{=html}
<div class="post-stream"><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2012"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2012.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Dec 07, 2012  14:49</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Today&#x27;s job report is not a good sign &amp; we could be facing another recession. No real job growth. We need over 300K new jobs a month.&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_277152838675746816" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/277152838675746816" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 05, 2015  10:33</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;It is time to create jobs for Americans</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_617717983826329600" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/617717983826329600" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 14, 2015  07:55</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Ford is MOVING jobs from Michigan to Mexico AGAIN! http://www.usatoday.com/story/money/cars/2015/07/09/ford-focus-cmax-mexico/29921307/ ‚Ä¶ As President</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_620939800888127488" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/620939800888127488" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2015"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2015.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Dec 28, 2015  06:42</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Many of the great jobs that the people of our country want are long gone</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_681455081699569664" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/681455081699569664" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2016"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2016.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 13, 2016  09:16</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Now an additional 600-700 jobs in America (2</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_698526221525610496" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/698526221525610496" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2016"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2016.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 01, 2016  20:33</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Vast numbers of manufacturing jobs in Pennsylvania have moved to Mexico and other countries. That will end when I win!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_760287440435187712" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/760287440435187712" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 04, 2017  07:19</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Thank you to Ford for scrapping a new plant in Mexico and creating 700 new jobs in the U.S. This is just the beginning - much more to follow&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_816635078067490816" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/816635078067490816" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 17, 2017  11:55</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Thank you to General Motors and Walmart for starting the big jobs push back into the U.S.!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_821415698278875137" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/821415698278875137" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 03, 2017  05:41</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Meeting with biggest business leaders this morning. Good jobs are coming back to U.S.</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_827482059438432260" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/827482059438432260" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 04, 2017  04:54</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Really great numbers on jobs &amp;amp; the economy! Things are starting to kick in now</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_881979394373406720" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/881979394373406720" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 25, 2017  23:35</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;&#x27;America&#x27;s Labor Market Continues to Boom&#x27; JOBS</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_889871789198802944" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/889871789198802944" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 04, 2017  20:45</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Excellent Jobs Numbers just released - and I have only just begun. Many job stifling regulations continue to fall. Movement back to USA!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_893452922427715584" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/893452922427715584" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2017"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2017.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Dec 31, 2017  06:42</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Jobs are kicking in and companies are coming back to the U.S. Unnecessary regulations and high taxes are being dramatically Cut</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_947236393184628741" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/947236393184628741" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 04, 2018  18:28</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Because Jobs in the U.S. are doing so well</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_992350362450518016" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/992350362450518016" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; May 23, 2018  21:18</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;There will be big news coming soon for our great American Autoworkers. After many decades of losing your jobs to other countries</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_999278498182258688" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/999278498182258688" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 18, 2018  19:33</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;3.4 million jobs created since our great Election Victory - far greater than ever anticipated</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1019545713435467776" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1019545713435467776" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 04, 2018  06:10</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;July is just the ninth month since 1970 that unemployment has fallen below 4%. Our economy has added 3.7 million jobs since I won the Election. 4.1 GDP. More than 4 million people have received a pay raise due to tax reform. $400 Billion brought back from “overseas.” @FoxNews&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1025504226204680192" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1025504226204680192" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Sep 03, 2018  19:28</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Happy Labor Day! Our country is doing better than ever before with unemployment setting record lows. The U.S. has tremendous upside potential as we go about fixing some of the worst Trade Deals ever made by any country in the world. Big progress being made!&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1036576599771111424" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1036576599771111424" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2018"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2018.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Nov 29, 2018  00:09</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Steel Dynamics announced that it will build a brand new 3 million ton steel mill in the Southwest that will create 600 good-paying U.S. JOBS. Steel JOBS are coming back to America</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1067812811068383232" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1067812811068383232" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 09, 2019  22:06</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Our Country is doing so well in so many ways. Great jobs numbers</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1083001986331672580" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1083001986331672580" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 21, 2019  23:22</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Last year was the best year for American Manufacturing job growth since 1997</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1087369882344349697" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1087369882344349697" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 10, 2019  20:05</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;More people are working today in the United States</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1104714962482749440" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1104714962482749440" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2019"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2019.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 12, 2019  11:26</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @PAChamber: Trade with Canada and Mexico supports more than 12 million American jobs in every state in the Union. In fact</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1149520407092875265" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1149520407092875265" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jan 22, 2020  22:09</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @RepRonWright: Another month @POTUS has delivered for Americans.  ✅145K new jobs in December ✅Unemployment is at a 50 year low ✅2.1 MILLION jobs added in 2019  With the recent passage of USMCA</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #4A5C3A">Military &amp; Veterans</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1219985390364393472" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1219985390364393472" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 04, 2020  23:52</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Market up big today on very good economic news. JOBS</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1224722351125823491" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1224722351125823491" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Feb 16, 2020  06:52</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @SenateGOP: Our booming economy is drawing Americans off the sidelines and BACK TO WORK at the highest rate in 30 years!    ✅ More Jobs ✅ Higher Wages ✅ Lower Unemployment   &#x27;While Democrats are fumbling around</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1228814332252884992" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1228814332252884992" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Mar 03, 2020  09:52</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;This is an incredible time for our nation—we are in the midst of the Great American Comeback! Jobs are booming</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B5E2A">Rallies &amp; Campaign</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1234657888762765313" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1234657888762765313" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 15, 2020  10:06</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;RT @TrumpWarRoom: President Trump’s America First economic policies are fueling the GREAT AMERICAN COMEBACK.  A record-breaking 4.8 million jobs were created in June! https://t.co/ZmKPzUDGsG&quot;</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1283221433859153931" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1283221433859153931" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2020"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2020.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Sep 04, 2020  21:04</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">&quot;Great Jobs Numbers! 1.37 Million Jobs Added In August. Unemployment Rate Falls To 8.4% (Wow</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1301868845678952448" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1301868845678952448" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2021"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2021.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@POTUS45</span> &middot; Apr 30, 2021  01:20</span><span class="platform">Twitter</span></div><div class="text">“Record JOBS DAY!! 223K jobs added. Unemployment is 3.8%, lowest in 50 yrs. Black and Asian unemployment hit historic new lows. Adult men and women, and teenagers, are at lowest since 2000. Hourly earnings are up! Tax CUTS are working. America is WINNING BIG under President Trump!”</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="tw_1002602715820756993" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://twitter.com/POTUS45/status/1002602715820756993" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2023"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2023.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Sep 23, 2023  01:17</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">On top of everything else going wrong with our Country, Interest Rates have just hit an almost 16 year high, and the housing market is crashing. Next up will ￼be the Autoworkers, who are being sold down the drain by Crooked Joe Biden and the leaders of the “United” Autoworkers. It doesn’t matter what salary you make, in 3 years these jobs will all be gone as Electric cars will almost entirely be made in CHINA. Be careful TRUCKERS, you’re next!!!</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_111111823044706695" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/111111823044706695" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2023"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2023.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Sep 23, 2023  05:28</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">RT @realDonaldTrumpOn top of everything else going wrong with our Country, Interest Rates have just hit an almost 16 year high, and the housing market is crashing. Next up will ￼be the Autoworkers, who are being sold down the drain by Crooked Joe Biden and the leaders of the “United” Autoworkers. It doesn’t matter what salary you make, in 3 years these jobs will all be gone as Electric cars will almost entirely be made in CHINA. Be careful TRUCKERS, you’re next!!!</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_111112807705502623" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/111112807705502623" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Jul 01, 2024  01:56</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">This is a disaster, and just the beginning of our companies FLEEING THE UNITED STATES! https://www.breitbart.com/economy/2024/06/30/john-deere-execute-big-layoffs-two-states-company-plans-shift-mexico/</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8C5E2A">Border &amp; Immigration</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_112708746238572276" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/112708746238572276" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Aug 29, 2024  17:37</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Kamalanomics is killing the American Economy! The new Jobs Report shows Employment among Native-born American Workers fell by 1.21 Million in the past 12 months, while Employment for Foreign born Workers, mostly Illegals, SKYROCKETED by 1.27 Million. MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN — VOTE TRUMP!</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113046522880943074" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113046522880943074" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Oct 10, 2024  18:11</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Under Kamala, we are now in a manufacturing recession, with manufacturing contracting in 22 out of the last 23 months. We have lost nearly 50,000 manufacturing jobs this year alone, car sales are down 38% since I left, the share of domestically produced cars sold has dropped significantly—and the U.S. trade deficit in automobiles has exploded by over $50 billion to an all-time high…</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113284474450637400" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113284474450637400" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Oct 10, 2024  18:22</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Today, I am announcing a detailed plan to save the American Auto-Industry, and bring millions of jobs back to our shores. If you vote for Trump, you will see a mass exodus of manufacturing jobs from Mexico to Michigan, from Shanghai to Sterling Heights, and from Beijing to right here in beautiful Detroit…</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113284516066586094" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113284516066586094" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2024"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2024.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Nov 01, 2024  18:24</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Today’s jobs report is a great embarrassment for our Nation. Kamala has lied for years about their pathetic job growth, which has never been real. Kamala killed 46,000 manufacturing jobs, while 773,000 Americans have lost employment in just the last year—all while their jobs have been taken by foreign-born workers. America is a Nation in Decline because Sleepy Joe, and Lyin’ Kamala, didn’t do their job. “TRUMP” WILL FIX IT! MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! GO VOTE!</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #8B1E3F">Bad Nicknames</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_113409096301808777" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/113409096301808777" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2025"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2025.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Dec 15, 2025  13:04</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">RT @PressSecWe know that Americans are still hurting from the 40-year high inflation caused by Joe Biden and the Democrats, but President Trump is making significant progress to fix it, and he won&#x27;t stop working until he solves it:✅The latest jobs report showed the American economy remains strong with 119,000 new jobs added – more than double expectations. In particular, construction jobs surged by 19,000 in the month of September, the largest monthly gain in a year.✅Inflation remains under control and real wages are on pace to increase roughly $1,200 for the average worker. This is a complete reversal of the failed Biden era where we saw inflation skyrocket to 9%, causing private sector workers to see their real wages decline by approximately $3,000 dollars.✅Since President Trump took office, all employment gains have gone to native-born workers rather than foreigners like we saw under Biden.Trust in Trump.</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_115723721796049924" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/115723721796049924" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2026"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2026.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Apr 04, 2026  03:03</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">178,000 new jobs in March. Unemployment DOWN. Great numbers by all accounts, even the Fake News. MAGA!</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #2E6F40">Economy &amp; Stock Market</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_116344212584161103" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/116344212584161103" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article><article class="post-card" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F" data-theme="jobs" data-year="2026"><div class="avatar" style="background-image:url(../assets/avatars/2026.jpg)"></div><div class="meta"><span><span class="handle">@realDonaldTrump</span> &middot; Apr 04, 2026  13:32</span><span class="platform">Truth Social</span></div><div class="text">Not only were the jobs numbers GREAT yesterday, 178,000 new jobs, but the TRADE DEFICIT was down 55%, the biggest drop in history. THANK YOU MR. TARIFF! All of this and, simultaneously, getting rid of a Nuclear Iran. MAGA!!!</div><div class="chips"><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #997A2E">Trade &amp; Tariffs</span><span class="chip" style="--chip-color: #B08030">Energy</span></div><div class="meta" style="margin-top:0.5em;"><span><button class="read-aloud" data-post-id="ts_116346686438015338" disabled>Read aloud</button></span><span><a href="https://truthsocial.com/@realDonaldTrump/116346686438015338" target="_blank" rel="noopener">permalink</a></span></div></article></div>
```


::: {.seal-divider}
![](../assets/seal.svg){width=60}
:::

[← Back to all topics](../themes.qmd){.small-caps}
